tweets.text: We've had a year of opportunity, a year of investment, a year of collaboration, a year of action. We know that the future is cleaner and greener, if we get there on time. And we can. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/x99WzIKSA2

In “The Week at State End-of-Year Edition” take a look back at 2022 as President Biden, Secretary Blinken, and other top officials addressed how the United States is ready and able to lead on the fundamental challenges of our time. https://t.co/QQn4yXnj8V
What a year! As we head into 2023, we pause to take account of the year that was. Read more on #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 for Americans and the world: https://t.co/Re8E29rC2K.

.@POTUS: The future will be won by the countries that unleash the full potential of their populations. The United States will always promote human rights and the values enshrined in the UN Charter in our own country and around the world. https://t.co/GyVdx8p7RF

.@SecBlinken: “Governments that violate human rights are almost always the same ones that flout other key parts of that order – such as invading, coercing, and threatening other countries, or breaking trade rules.” The U.S. will continue to take a stand for human rights for all. https://t.co/rmkOYRpWQ5

.@SecBlinken on COVID-19: No one’s safe till everyone’s safe. And as long as the virus is percolating somewhere, it could be mutating, and we might end up with a variant that defeats the very strong tools that we’ve now put in place to deal with it. https://t.co/ZPoQ6NwHnG

.@SecBlinken: The United States continues to be intently focused on fighting the COVID-19 pandemic and leaving the world better prepared and better defended for whatever comes next. https://t.co/cOGV7sJBgh
It’s that time of year again — time for @SecBlinken's annual “At Home” and “On the Road” playlists on @Spotify! Check out his favorite songs from U.S. and international artists this year:

.@SecBlinken: We made significant strides in ending the acute phase of the COVID-19 pandemic – providing nearly $20 billion for the global response, distributing more than 670 million doses of safe, effective vaccines to over 115 countries. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/Zd4D8Sj4nU

.@SecBlinken: COVID-19 has taught us that when it comes to global health, none of us are safe until all of us are safe — and that our health security is closely interlinked with our economic and national security. We must not waste this hard-earned knowledge. https://t.co/gJif4EVfBO

.@SecBlinken: Climate action is not about sacrifice. It’s about opportunity. It’s about innovation. It’s about prosperity. It’s about justice. And it’s about building a future that we can all be proud of and the future that our children and grandchildren deserve. https://t.co/XWalPS7cWa

America is leading the world on addressing the climate crisis and we will continue on this path. If we succeed, we will capitalize on the greatest opportunity to create quality jobs in generations, build a more equitable, healthy, and sustainable society, and protect our planet. https://t.co/T1ebFy99pe

We will look back on 2022 as one of the most pivotal years for the health of the planet and its people, says @SciDiplomacyUSA Assistant Secretary Medina. Read her latest DipNote blog to learn more about this momentous year. https://t.co/h368GhASmG

.@POTUS: We are proving that good climate policy is good economic policy. It’s a strong foundation for durable, resilient, inclusive economic growth. It’s driving progress in the private sector. It’s driving progress around the world. https://t.co/qt2fqo6Jp1

The U.S. is taking urgent action to limit warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. We launched the Global Methane Pledge to cut methane emissions at least 30 percent by 2030. Over 125 countries have joined us to reduce methane emissions. https://t.co/0ZDki6yFnJ https://t.co/cJA1FmoBvI

.@POTUS: I will do everything in my power to clean our air and water, protect our people’s health, to win the clean energy future. If we don’t keep it below 1.5 degrees Centigrade, we lose it all. We don’t get to turn it around. https://t.co/YuyWWxZmrw

.@SecBlinken: On climate, we leveraged historic investments at home and abroad to accelerate the clean energy transition and adapt to the effects of a warming climate. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/B1rQT4fj1w

The #HiddenNoMore exchange continues to be one of @ECAatState's most transformative initiatives, helping women worldwide interact to break down barriers. More on this @StateIVLP program, which was established in 2017 to empower women leaders in STEM: https://t.co/EFOqLTiq8m

.@SecBlinken: Whether we were addressing threats and risks posed by strategic competitors, combating global challenges, or seizing opportunities to improve Americans’ lives, our alliances and our partnerships proved the vital difference. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/O6dLGKs3tR

We can’t advance U.S. interests and values around the world without a workforce that is truly representative of the American people. Check out @doscareers if you are interested in helping us in our diplomatic missions around the globe. https://t.co/kI9OZWgyaZ https://t.co/aXxs9LXJxQ
.@SecBlinken: We took major steps to ensure the State Department is positioned and empowered to meet tomorrow’s challenges. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/OKWIkD2Vxs

.@SecBlinken: We have done and we continue to do day in, day out, exactly what we said. And that’s not sitting back and waiting for someone to hit the ball at us. It is us, every single day, with our diplomacy making good on those commitments. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/iocQ8Y5rM5
Around the world we face challenges such as climate crisis, human rights, and the COVID-19 pandemic. Read more about how multilateral initiatives make the world better: https://t.co/byi0LaQhH8.

.@SecBlinken: We showed that the U.S. is ready and able to lead on the fundamental challenges of our time. And countries around the world demonstrated why they want to be our partners in building a world that’s more free, open, secure, and prosperous. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/9inaYFab6P

.@SecBlinken: I set out our strategy to meet the challenge posed by the People's Republic of China: Invest in the foundations of our strength at home; align with our partners and allies; compete with China so that we can defend our interests and realize our vision for the future. https://t.co/kZLrg0Auoe

.@SecBlinken: We’ll continue to pursue cooperation on issues that demand that the United States and China work together – for the good of our people, but also for the good of people around the world. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/OoXyUYiQpe

The Kremlin has been using energy to weaken and divide Europe, and during the middle of winter, Russian forces are bombing homes and infrastructure in Ukraine. European countries are safer without the Kremlin’s blackmail. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/E7HbrEV8KK
"Stop the war. Stop the killing. Stop the destruction." More from @SecBlinken's message to President Putin and his @CNN interview earlier this year: https://t.co/t1fWzNYNJR https://t.co/YiVeueLoNj

.@POTUS: At every step, we have shown that the United States and our Allies and partners are working in unison…And we’re united in our understanding of the urgency and seriousness of the threat Russia is making to global peace and stability. https://t.co/gf03Q9FbQ6

.@SecBlinken: Russia has bombed out more than a third of Ukraine’s energy system, plunging millions into cold, into darkness, as frigid temperatures set in. Heat, water, electricity – for children, for the elderly, for the sick – these are President Putin’s new targets. https://t.co/bf7L5qRTF5
.@SecBlinken: Ultimately, I am absolutely convinced that Putin will fail and Russia will suffer a strategic defeat. https://t.co/4nlm61DYgt
In 2022, global citizens in cities around the world spoke out against Russian aggression, showing unity and support for the people of Ukraine. #UnitedWithUkraine https://t.co/3X9w2KoQX0
.@SecBlinken: We rallied the world to ensure that Russia’s war on Ukraine is a strategic failure. #WhereDiplomacyDelivered2022 https://t.co/vw4UUbJPi5
We hope everyone observing Kwanzaa has a peaceful, joyful, and meaningful celebration. May the principles of Kwanzaa guide you toward hope, unity, and prosperity this season. https://t.co/NBRtLGhcnh
Blair House is the President’s guest house, a place where leaders from around the world stay. @us_protocol explains how staff come together to deck the halls for the holidays. https://t.co/hlBxeIH9mT
Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays to everyone around the world celebrating today. We send you season’s greetings and our best wishes. https://t.co/f5W4R8dJXM

.@POTUS at the #USAfricaLeadersSummit22 this month: I’m announcing an additional $2 billion in humanitarian assistance to address acute food insecurity in Africa, assistance that’s going to help ensure that children and families don’t have to go to bed hungry. https://t.co/yGJ1wJbkG9

.@SecBlinken: Most important, beyond what we say, is what we do—not only for the good of the people around the world bearing the brunt of this crisis, but also because the health, the stability, the wellbeing of our people depends on the food security that we build together. https://t.co/pEXBBax17C

Food is an essential, but scarce, resource in many parts of the world. Global conflicts, climate change, and supply disruptions from COVID-19 have exacerbated the problem. Learn how climate change affects today’s food crisis. https://t.co/43OhWvm6np
The United States is leading the way to help those who face hunger and malnutrition, while also working hard to address the root causes of the food security crisis. https://t.co/f0KaLkzhKA
